arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher highlights the one 'BIG mistake' Ruben Amorim has made as Man United boss since derby win that has left the club in a 'really poor position'
arts.sum: Just days after the derby victory, Amorim selected a rotated side for an EFL Cup quarter-final with Spurs with five changes to the team that battled back to beat City.

arts.ttl: Newcastle goals show three Man United players Ruben Amorim needs to think about selling
arts.sum: Four minutes is all it took Newcastle to take the lead against Man United on Monday night and the goal would have had Ruben Amorim questioning three of his players. It has been a tough start to life for the Portuguese coach at Old Trafford having lost his last three matches in charge of the […] The post Newcastle goals show three Man United players Ruben Amorim needs to think about selling appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans ruthlessly CHEER Joshua Zirkzee sub as flop suffers 'massive embarrassment'
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Joshua Zirkzee was taken off after just 33 minutes against Newcastle at Old Trafford - and was subjected to an embarrassing response from the home fans

arts.ttl: Gary Neville blasts Man United as 'the worst pound-for-pound team in the country' as Ruben Amorim's side are mauled by Newcastle in the first half at Old Trafford
arts.sum: United went into the game in 14th place in the Premier League and they made a woeful start at Old Trafford as Alexander Isak put Newcastle ahead after just four minutes.

arts.ttl: Man United fans claim Newcastle goal should have been RULED OUT after ball appeared to strike Joelinton's arm - but VAR did not intervene
arts.sum: Man United fans took to social media after Newcastle netted their second goal at Old Trafford on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Stats show that things are getting worse for Man United under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: The 2024/25 campaign has been a disaster so far for Man United, and having made a managerial change mid-season, the Manchester club are yet to see the benefits of bringing in Ruben Amorim. Man United currently sit 14th in the Premier League after 18 matches with just six wins throughout the first half of the […] The post Stats show that things are getting worse for Man United under Ruben Amorim appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford's return to Man Utd squad
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim explains why Marcus Rashford has returned to the Man Utd squad to face Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville spots worrying Ruben Amorim and Erik ten Hag similarity at Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United great turned Sky Sports pundit Gary Neville has spotted a worrying trend in Ruben Amorim's time at Old Trafford so far.

arts.ttl: Chris Dobey and Callan Rydz show true Newcastle United colours ahead of Man United showdown
arts.sum: Both Chris Dobey and Callan Rydz showed their true Newcastle United colours as they progressed through to the quarter-finals of the PDC World Darts Championship at Alexandra Palace. However, the crowd got behind Rydz and he came back to secure his place in the quarter finals.

arts.ttl: Man United players make true feelings clear on Marcus Rashford return after Newcastle decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was included in Manchester United's squad to play Newcastle United despite ongoing question marks on his Old Trafford future.
